display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(70, 88, 106) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(107, 84, 16) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
An agent CLI you launch yourself?
claude / codex / opencode

div.style: color: rgb(107, 84, 16) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
A model endpoint that many
clients already hit?

div.style: color: rgb(107, 84, 16) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
An agent that executes its own tools
and should ask for a verdict first?

div.style: color: rgb(107, 84, 16) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
No model in the loop -
you just want the floor checked?

div.style: color: rgb(28, 82, 48) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(27, 58, 102) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
fak serve --base-url ...
the bare-serve production path:
policy file + auth-key env + /healthz + /metrics

div.style: color: rgb(27, 58, 102) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
fak serve --stdio
manual MCP server: the agent asks the kernel
about a call before running it itself

div.style: color: rgb(27, 58, 102) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
fak policy --check / fak preflight
no model, no key, no listener -
author and gate the floor in CI

div.style: color: rgb(27, 58, 102) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Air-gapped or privacy-bound?
add --gguf: a local model in-kernel,
no key, no network after the first pull

div.style: color: rgb(70, 88, 106) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
One binary, four shapes: you add flags, not components.
Pick by what you already run,
not by what you are willing to rewrite.
